message_history.text:
Quick one on "Zendesk queue is killing us on refunds": same-week reduction in back-and-forth is the usual outcome.

If you want, I’ll mirror your rules on a batch so you can compare before committing.

entries.follow_up_message: Circling back on support throughput — want a no-cost pass on a few live tickets so you can compare handle time?

message_history.text:
warm_lead — saw the pain in: "Need to cut ticket volume fast".

We fix the support workflow bottleneck in about 7 days — free setup, pay only if it works.

I can run this on your tickets for free if you want proof on real volume.
Yes — let's schedule something this week.

Let’s test it on your tickets — takes ~10 mins. Pick a slot here: https://cal.com/example/10min

If none of those work, reply with two windows that fit and I’ll adapt.

entries.reply_text: Yes — let's schedule something this week.
